title: The King's Epic Adventure 4 Act 2
description:
HAPPY LATE 4K EVERYBODY!! 
Many thanks to Yukarikanashii88 for providing the voice of Miyuki in this video! Credit goes to her for that, and I'm also giving credit to myself, Likety, Commander/CommonGwonam, Whelt, and HaHaHound for the featured poops, and to Chaofanatic for inspiration for the second boss battle. ...oh, and MountainDewMaNN for the 3d text near the end. And thank the rest of y'all for tuning in! On with the show!
Episode 4 act 2: Friends in need! Everywhere!! The 4000+ Sub Spectacular!!
King Harkinian and his party are thrown in King Koopa's dungeon when the floor collapses under him. Picking himself up from his fall, the King must find his way through the collapsing halls of King Koopa's Neon Castle and TYCO THAT'S HOW YOU SPELL RC! 
Meanwhile, Miyuki resides at the home base where she's about to enjoy a snack. Still upset over past events, The King has ordered to her stay there and house-sit the base. Of course, when he hears the sharp cry of her friends, who have been imprisoned by Robotnik, she decides to take a stand and take matters in her own hands. Everything she does successfully is by complete accident.
To top off my 4k spectacular is a surprise ending. Enjoy!
